text.message: At least it’ll be a quick game
Idk what blue was doing. Blocked us and didn’t do much for himself either
You don’t need it. You have good numbers on ALL resources and you’ve space to go around.
You are already at late game for which you have better access than all of us
Not even fun honestly. :/ losing is okay but to be this far behind one player from the start..that too because someone’s bad decision also affects yours
Yeah. You are the best player in the game blue
